fault_hypothesis: On line 67, the merge uses `a or b` (disjunction) instead of `a and b` (conjunction), producing True whenever either mask is True rather than only when both are True.

constraints.intent: After appending, the last element must equal the conjunction of a and b, not the disjunction.
At the end of every loop iteration the appended value must be the logical AND of a and b.

spec.expr: all(merged__1[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(merged__1)))

constraints.intent: The merged list must be the element-wise AND of both input masks.

spec.expr: all(__cbfl_result[i] == (mask_a[i] and mask_b[i]) for i in range(len(__cbfl_result)))

constraints.intent: The returned mask must be the conjunction of both input masks at every position.
